stimulus: As the first Black woman elected to the United States Congress, Shirley Chisholm became one of the most ______blank figures in her country's political history: among the many achievements of her seven terms in office (1969–1983), Chisholm helped expand the federal food stamp program and was a founding member of the Congressional Black Caucus.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale: Choice A is the best answer because "consequential" means having significant impact, matching the text's description of major achievements during a long tenure. Choice B is incorrect because "routine" means ordinary, contradicting the description of significant achievements. Choice C is incorrect because "mysterious" suggests obscurity; the text emphasizes visible accomplishments. Choice D is incorrect because "fleeting" suggests short duration; the text emphasizes a seven-term, fourteen-year career with lasting impact.
